Artificial intelligence (KI) or artificial intelligence (AI) is the imitation of human skills with a computer system, such as: learning, reasoning, anticipation and plans to automatically adjust themselves.
Deep learning This technique is a simulation of biological neural networks through advanced machine learning.
Machine-learning algorithms To train AI, an AI learning model is used to process and analyze (big) data.
This implements semantic search among other things and ensures that a search provides the answer directly in the results.
